page.title: Osteoporosis — Disease Intelligence | OSMF
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for Osteoporosis: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for Osteoporosis: 142 alterations and 221 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

alterations.name: AGAP1
alterations.definition: ArfGAP with GTPase domain, ankyrin repeat and PH domain 1

alterations.name: CACNG3
alterations.definition: calcium voltage-gated channel auxiliary subunit gamma 3

alterations.name: CAMK2D
alterations.definition: calcium/calmodulin dependent protein kinase II delta

alterations.name: CCBE1
alterations.definition: collagen and calcium binding EGF domains 1

alterations.name: Change in Lumbar Spine Areal Bone Mineral Density (BMD)
FGD6
alterations.definition: FYVE, RhoGEF and PH domain containing 6

alterations.name: FHL5
alterations.definition: four and a half LIM domains 5

alterations.name: GRIN2B
alterations.definition: glutamate ionotropic receptor NMDA type subunit 2B

alterations.name: KCNK13
alterations.definition: potassium two pore domain channel subfamily K member 13

alterations.name: LDLRAD3
alterations.definition: low density lipoprotein receptor class A domain containing 3

alterations.name: MYRIP
alterations.definition: myosin VIIA and Rab interacting protein

alterations.name: NACA2
alterations.definition: nascent polypeptide associated complex subunit alpha 2

alterations.name: NUF2
alterations.definition: NUF2 component of NDC80 kinetochore complex

alterations.name: PKD2
alterations.definition: polycystin 2, transient receptor potential cation channel

alterations.name: PLEKHH2
alterations.definition: pleckstrin homology, MyTH4 and FERM domain containing H2

alterations.name: Percent change in BMD, as measured by DXA, at the lumbar spine (L1-L4) and total hip, trochanter and femoral neck
Rate of participants with Change of Height
Rate of participants with Change of Weight
STARD13
alterations.definition: StAR related lipid transfer domain containing 13

alterations.name: The change in the mean Bone Mineral Density of the two randomized groups
The presence or not of cerebral vasculopathy
The presence or not of impaired cardiac function and / or cardiac anatomy related to sickle cell disease
VWDE
alterations.definition: von Willebrand factor D and EGF domains

alterations.name: Value change of serum 25-OH vitamin D
Value change of serum C Reactive Protein value
Value change of serum Lactate DeHydrogenase value
Value change of serum iron and ferritin

natural_products.key_findings: Melatonin may provide a safe and effective alternative to proton-pump inhibitors in the treatment of gastroesophageal reflux disease.; Kava is effective against menopausal anxiety, accelerating the resolution of psychological symptoms.; Progesterone may reverse osteoporosis.
